# fixtures/ada

Ada fixture file for `.scm` query tests.

- `sample.adb` — defines a `Calculator` package body with `Add`, `Subtract`, `Multiply`, `Classify`, `Print_Result`, and `Run_Demo` subprograms; uses `Ada.Text_IO` and `Ada.Integer_Text_IO`; includes loops and if/elsif branching; includes a `pragma Inline(Add)` to exercise `pragma_g` decoration capture.
